subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! He speaketh: The essence hath been inscribed in His remembrance - verily He cannot be indicated by My indication, nor by that which hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن بیان میفرماید قد کتبت جوهره فی ذکره انه لایشار باشارتی و لا بما نزل
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @Manifestation of God as sun
